statement: In every magma, Equation 2585 (`x = (y * ((z * y) * x)) * y`) implies Equation 223 (`x = (y * (x * y)) * z`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0153
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z : G, x = (op (op y (op (op z y) x)) y)) :
    ∀ x y z : G, x = (op (op y (op x y)) z)
